name: Kure Raian
description: Kure Raian (呉くれ 雷らい庵あん), also known as The Devil (魔ま人じん, Majin) is an assassin from the infamous Kure Clan. He represented Under Mount, Inc. as their affiliated fighter during the Kengan Annihilation Tournament and was one of the three assassins in the tournament. Two years later, he fought in the Kengan Association VS Purgatory Tournament, representing the Kengan Association.
creator: Slaughter_ToPrevail
